title: DRW MD-DRW-536: Gimbal Controller PCB
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-536 Rev A — Gimbal Controller PCB

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1158.
4. Drawn by Rowan Ellery, checked by Cass Doyle, approved by Felix Herrera.
